title: Sattena Thooralum Lyrics Manja Pai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Sattena Thooralum
Singer: Karthik
MOvie: Manja Pai
Music: N.R. Raghunanthan
Lyricist: Yugabharathi

Sattena thooralum kottiyadheppadi
uyir moththamum unnidam ottiyadheppadi.

Adi kadhal vandhal thannaale
iru kannum theeyaai eriyudhadi.
Siru pillai pola naan thulla
en idhayam aanadhu thagudupodi.

Sattena thooralum kottiyadheppadi
uyir moththamum unnidam ottiyadheppadi.

Idhayam enbadhu enakkum unndena
tharindhu kondadhe unnaal thaan.
Edhayum unnidam pagirndhu kollave
virumbuginradhe nenjam thaan.

Nizhal mattum thodarndhu vandha
nilamai maari ponadhe.
Nijam unnai nerungi nirkka
vayadhu kolam podudhe.

Ippadiyum naan aavenaa.
moththamum maari povenaa.
karpanai naan seivenaa
kandapadi poi solvenaa.

Yaarai ketka, kaigal korkka
nee illaamal vazhvenaa.

Sattena thooralum kottiyadheppadi
uyir moththamum unnidam ottiyadheppadi.

Unadhu punnagai urassi selgayil
udhirugindradhe kaayangal.
Unadhu melliya viralgal thottadhum
nigazhugindradhe maayangal.

Edhai kandum bayandhadhillai
idharkku munbu naanumey.
Unai kandu padhattam ondru
varuvadhenna naalumey.

Eththanai pengal nindraalum
en vizhi unnai thaedudhadi.
Thandhadhu podhum endraalum
innamum kadhal ketkudhadi.

Adiye endhan aayul raegai
undha kaigalil odudhadi.

Sattena thooralum kottiyadheppadi
uyir moththamum unnidam ottiyadheppadi.

Adi kadhal vandhal thannaale
iru kannum theeyaai eriyudhadi.
Siru pillai pola naan thulla
en idhayam aanadhu thagudupodi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Sattena Thooralum'?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and affection, illustrating how love can envelop one's entire being.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Manjapai'?

In Manjapai, the song reflects the romantic journey of the characters, highlighting their emotional connection.

Who is the singer of 'Sattena Thooralum'?

The song is sung by the talented Karthik, known for his melodious voice and expressive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Sattena Thooralum' was composed by N. R. Raghunanthan, who is known for his unique musical style.

When was 'Sattena Thooralum' released?

The song was released on April 8, 2014, as part of the movie Manjapai.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sattena Thooralum, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions towards his beloved, encapsulating the essence of love in a beautiful melody. The song plays a pivotal role in Manjapai, showcasing the romantic bond between the characters. With its soothing lyrics and captivating music, it evokes feelings of joy and nostalgia. The heartfelt delivery by Karthik adds depth to the song, making it a memorable experience for listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sattena Thooralum from Manjapai is a delightful melody that captures the essence of love and affection. With Karthik's soulful voice and N. R. Raghunanthan's enchanting composition, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the magic of romance. Dive into the lyrical beauty crafted by Yugabharathi, making this track a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Don't let your life be taken away like a straw. Don't let your entire life be tied to you.
When love comes, it burns both eyes like fire. My heart, like a small child, is trembling.
Don't let your life be taken away like a straw. Don't let your entire life be tied to you.
My heart is something that you have given me. It wants to share everything with you. My heart desires to be with you.
The shadow just continues, but the situation changes. The truth is that you are being held in a beautiful form.
Am I going to be like this? Will everything change? Will I create dreams or will I just lie?
Who will listen? Can you live without holding hands?
Don't let your life be taken away like a straw. Don't let your entire life be tied to you.
Your smile is like a treasure that brings joy. Your gentle touch creates wonders.
Seeing something doesn't scare me; before this, I was also afraid. What will happen when I see you?
No matter how many girls come, my eyes will search for you. Even if I have received something, I still want to hear love.
My life is tied to your hands.
Don't let your life be taken away like a straw. Don't let your entire life be tied to you.
When love comes, it burns both eyes like fire. My heart, like a small child, is trembling.
